title: Interleaving String
problem_statement: Given strings s1, s2, and s3, determine if s3 is formed by an interleaving of s1 and s2.

examples.explanation: s3 can be formed by interleaving s1 and s2 while preserving relative order.

intuition: Use DP on prefixes of s1 and s2 to see if they can form a prefix of s3.

approaches.name: 2D prefix DP
approaches.description: dp[i][j] is true if s3[0..i+j-1] can be formed from s1[0..i-1] and s2[0..j-1].
approaches.why_not: Brute forcing interleavings is exponential due to many ordering choices.

interview_qa.q: What is the dp state for Interleaving String?
interview_qa.a: dp[i][j] indicates whether prefixes of length i and j from s1 and s2 can form a prefix of s3 of length i+j.
From dp[i-1][j] if next char comes from s1 or dp[i][j-1] if it comes from s2.
